heading: Waiver of applicability of certain laws
label: 2343 Waiver of applicability of certain laws
text: Sections 4651, 3201, 3351, 3352(a), 3352(c), 3701 through 3708, and 3841 of this title and shall not apply to acquisitions made under the authority of or to agreements entered into under .section 6306 of title 41section 2341 of this titlesection 2342 of this title
